## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, review process, and project status.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** 5 new articles are ready for review, adding to the current backlog. To manage holiday capacity, content production will be paused or reduced during Christmas week.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Review Process:** To address feedback on an "AI voice," GrowthX will refine writing guidelines and implement a post-processing checklist. The current review bottleneck is a common issue during initial sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Project Status:** You.com has requested a project rollover, confirming the engagement will continue past the initial strategy sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Tooling:** Brooke will share Brandlight prompts with Erik to create parity with Scrunch tracking. Erik will provide video walkthroughs for both Scrunch and Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** A backlog of articles exists, with 5 more arriving this week.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Context:** This is a common issue in early sprints as teams calibrate on voice and style.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**Solution:** To manage holiday capacity, content production will be paused or reduced during Christmas week.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Content Quality & Process Improvement

  - [**Feedback:** The first reviewed article had an "AI voice."](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will refine writing guidelines and implement a post-processing checklist to ensure a more conversational tone.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Brand Guidelines:** Katya will update the image pipeline to produce two versions in different sizes, per the shared guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

### Tooling & Reporting

  - [**Video Walkthroughs:** Erik will provide recordings for Scrunch and Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Ada will likely record the Looker video due to her expertise with the data sources (RGA, Search Console).](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Note:** Looker data may change as You.com recalibrates its tagging.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**Tool Parity:** To align tracking, Brooke will download and share Brandlight prompts with Erik for upload to Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Project Continuation

  - [**Decision Point:** Week 7 requires a decision on continuing the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Status:** You.com has already requested a project rollover via its contracts manager.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Review the current article backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Download and share Brandlight prompts with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [Provide video walkthroughs for Scrunch and Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Inform the GrowthX team of the project rollover.](https://fathom.video/share/7s9NYs1zGbYeNmS1vvuMjX5CwSLr_RCf?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
